---
title: "Route Simulation Animation"
format: html
---

This page publishes the latest route animation assets generated from the validated distribution transport run.

- Run: `distribution_davis_fu_final`
- Date: `2026-03-09`
- Color mapping: `Diesel = blue`, `BEV = gold`

## Downloads

- [Animation bundle ZIP](assets/transport/downloads/animation_assets_full_n20_fix.zip)
- [Diesel animation MP4](assets/transport/downloads/route_animation_diesel.mp4)
- [BEV animation MP4](assets/transport/downloads/route_animation_bev.mp4)
- [Diesel vs BEV animation MP4](assets/transport/downloads/route_animation_diesel_vs_bev.mp4)
- [Monte Carlo evolution MP4](assets/transport/downloads/transport_mc_evolution.mp4)
- [Monte Carlo evolution GIF](assets/transport/downloads/transport_mc_evolution.gif)

## Route Animation Previews

### Diesel (blue)

<video controls preload="metadata" width="100%">
  <source src="assets/transport/downloads/route_animation_diesel.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

### BEV (gold)

<video controls preload="metadata" width="100%">
  <source src="assets/transport/downloads/route_animation_bev.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

### Side-by-side Diesel vs BEV

<video controls preload="metadata" width="100%">
  <source src="assets/transport/downloads/route_animation_diesel_vs_bev.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

## Latest Route/Metric Sample

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
rows_path <- "assets/transport/distribution_davis_fu_final/data/transport_sim_rows.csv"
if (file.exists(rows_path)) {
  df <- utils::read.csv(rows_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  keep <- c(
    "replicate_id", "scenario_name", "powertrain", "origin_name", "destination_name",
    "route_id", "base_route_distance_miles", "trip_distance_miles", "trip_duration_hours",
    "congestion_delay_hours", "charging_events", "co2_per_1000kcal"
  )
  for (nm in keep) if (!(nm %in% names(df))) df[[nm]] <- NA
  show <- df[df$replicate_id == min(df$replicate_id, na.rm = TRUE), keep, drop = FALSE]
  knitr::kable(show)
} else {
  cat("<p><em>Rows CSV not found at <code>", rows_path, "</code>.</em></p>", sep = "")
}
```
